auth_domain.description: Specifies the domain that users must belong to in order to access the application, typically required for authentication.

database_type.description: Specifies the type of database to use for the App Engine application; must be a supported database type.

feature_settings.description: Configures specific features for the App Engine application, such as split health checks or other feature flags.

iap.description: Controls Identity-Aware Proxy settings for the application; must be enabled to restrict access to the app using Google accounts.

location_id.description: Specifies the geographic location for the App Engine application, must be a region where App Engine is supported.

serving_status.description: Defines the operational status of the App Engine application, determining whether it should serve traffic or be disabled. Acceptable values: "SERVING", "USER_DISABLED".

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations, allowing customization of timeout settings for App Engine application management.
